title: Singapore MRT NSEWL C151 and C651
description: Singapore MRT C151 and C651 for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
This pack requires **Minecraft Transit Railway**.

Contents:

- SMRT Trains C151 (regular and mini variants)
- SMRT Trains C651 (regular and mini variants)
- SMRT Trains C651 Refurbished, never re-entered service (regular and mini variants)
